about-description: My name is Bălan Eduard I am 26 years old and I consider myself a person who has a great passion when it comes to development of websites, platforms and apps for the vast world of the Internet.

During the last two years I gained experience in web development by studying and practicing of knowledge from platforms specialized in web development (W3Schools, Mozilla developers, freeCodeCamp, StackOverflow), but also from tutorials of more advanced developers. I developed some personal projects to serve as proof of my experience.
As a person I consider myselft persistent, flexible, receptive, always eager to learn new things and to give my best in every project that I am involved.
Here is a list of technologies that I used: HTML, CSS, Boots­trap, Java­Script, JSON, AJAX, Fetch, API
